Describe the sequence of movements involving the motorcycle and rider.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a rider wearing blue jeans maneuvers a motorcycle out of a white enclosed trailer; at 11s, the motorcycle's chrome exhaust pipes become visible as it exits; at 12s, the rider sits stationary on a red motorcycle with a spoked front wheel; at 13s, another black motorcycle is visible parked in the background.

question: Detail the visible signage and structures appearing across the different scenes.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a tall sign displays the Harley-Davidson logo near a commercial building; at 7s, circular tire marks are visible on the concrete pavement in front of the building; at 10s, a building with an orange sign is visible outside the trailer; at 16s, a large orange structure with silver metal corner trim appears behind a man.
